title: T-108 — restore FK tenant_migrations.tenant_id → organizations(id) once T-039 verified in prod (FT-048)
prompt:
# T-108 — restore FK tenant_migrations.tenant_id → organizations(id) once T-039 verified in prod (FT-048)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §8
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-048** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
FK tenant_migrations.tenant_id → organizations(id) restored with the required ON DELETE semantics.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 037 ALTER TABLE tenant_migrations ADD CONSTRAINT tenant_migrations_tenant_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT.
2. Pre-flight test asserts no orphan rows.
3. Test asserts FK violation raises SQLSTATE 23503 on cross-org insert.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/037-tenant-migrations-fk-restore.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/tenant-migrations-fk.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 037 applied, when an INSERT references a non-existent organizations.id, then SQLSTATE 23503 is raised.
2. Given the pre-flight, when run, then zero orphan tenant_migrations rows are reported.

## Test strategy
- RED: write tenant-migrations-fk.test.ts asserting FK violation before migration.
- Pin SQLSTATE 23503.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db migrate && pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test tenant-migrations-fk`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not restore the FK before the app-layer guard is prod-verified.
- Do not use ON DELETE CASCADE.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Restore the FK tenant_migrations.tenant_id → organizations(id) after T-039 app-layer FK guard is verified in production.
pipeline_inputs.details: T-038 dropped the FK to unblock the app-layer guard. Once T-039 has shipped and the guard is verified in prod, restore the FK for defense-in-depth.
